title: Delta 2
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Delta 2''' was a [[Zinsian]] processing center on [[Brosi]], near [[Nihun River]]. It was within the sphere of influence area of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
